transcript: Say hi. Hi. Nine months, 26 years. Wow. Ready? Yes. Jyoti Amge is the smallest woman in the world. Yeah. What size are you, honey? Three months. At 26 years old and only 24 inches tall, Jyoti may be pint-sized, but her personality is super-sized. You did such a good job on American Horror Story. I loved it. Now, Jyoti is visiting America because she loves the lifestyle here and to hopefully continue her acting career. The phone's important so she can talk to boys. Ah, yeah! Can I get you a drink yes yeah i like butterflies hi dr chan we'll get you ready for the x-ray okay but jyoti's biggest reason for coming to the u.. is much more serious. It's for her health. जो लाइफ है ठीक हो जाए
